/CAL: TRAILING #22004081/CONTD: FURTHER PRE-HEARING CONFERENCE AND TO SETPRELIMINARY HEARING IN #22004081/X: IF THERE IS NO AGREED DISPOSITION AT NEXT CALLING, THE COURT WILL HEAR ARGUMENT ON DA'S MOTION TO DETAIN,/DOP/

/CAL:PREHEARING CONFERENCE/STWPX/TWS/TEXT:DEFT ADV & PERS WVS CONST & CITZ RTS ENT PLEA OF G/DEFT ADV RTS:2/FNDG/CO:NEGOTIATED DISPOSITION/X: THIS IS A DEFERRED ENTRY OF JUDGEMENT/REMA/ARBUCKLE/CTORD:DEFENDANT IS NO LONGER CONFINED WITHIN THE INTERIOR PREMISES OF RESIDENCE (HOME DETENTION),HOWEVER REMAINS ON ELECTONIC MONITORING WITH A CURFEW FROM 8 PM TO 4AM/

/CAL:PREHEARING CONFERENCE/ACM/X:DEFENDANT IS TO ATTEND THE STOP AND CASCPROGRAMS/X:AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S OFFICE,/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH A GPSDEVICE AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THE RECORD AND BY THE SFSO/CTORD: DEFENDANT SHALL BE RELEASED AFTER A COORDINATED PICK-UP WITH SFSO COMMUNITY PROGRAMS IS IN PLACE,/X:DEFENDANT IS TOREMAIN CONFINED WITHIN INTERIOR PREMISES OF RESIDENCE(HOME DETENTION) UNLESS AUTHORIZED BY A SFSO SWORN EMPLOYEE/CTORD:DEFENDANT TO STAY 150 YARDS AWAY FROM 1600 GEARY BLVD, SF/X:DEFENDANT SHALL POSSESS NO WEAPONS/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/CONTD:PREHEARING CONFERENCE AND TO SET/DOP/

/CAL:PREHEARING CONFERENCE/ACM/X:DEFENDANT IS TO CHECK IN 3X PER WEEK, ATTEND THE STOP AND CASC PROGRAMS/X:AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE, THE DEFENDANTSHALL BE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S OFFICE,/DEF:SHALLBE FITTED WITH A GPS DEVICE AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THE RECORD AND BY THE SFSO/CTORD: DEFENDANT SHALL BERELEASED AFTER A COORDINATED PICK-UP WITH SFSO COMMUNITY PROGRAMS IS IN PLACE,/X:DEFENDANT IS TO REMAIN CONFINED WITHIN INTERIOR PREMISES OF RESIDENCE(HOME DETENTION) UNLESS AUTHORIZED BY A SFSO SWORN EMPLOYEE/CTORD:DEFENDANT TO STAY 150 YARDS AWAY FROM 1600 GEARY BLVD, SF/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/CONTD:PREHEARING CONFERENCE/DOPU/X:ZOOM OK/
